title: BeatBanker malware targets Android users with banking Trojan and crypto miner

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — BeatBanker malware targets Android users with banking Trojan
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/17
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*com.destination.cosmetics*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
